lookingFor.title: What I'm looking for
lookingFor.paragraph1: I'm best in the gap between a system that exists on paper and the people it's supposed to serve. Looking for roles in digital public infrastructure, social commerce, or development programs - where the work is making things land, not just launch.
lookingFor.paragraph2: Open to relocation within India. Available for full-time roles, consulting engagements, and advisory positions.

sectionDesc: Open to roles in ecosystem development, social-sector program delivery, digital commerce strategy, and impact-driven communication.
